Description: Natural image dataset containing photographs of people, animals, sports, landscapes, and daily-life scenes. Each image is paired with a textual description.
Image annotation dataset where each image is associated with multiple user-provided tags and descriptions collected through the ESP Game platform.
Flickr photo collection containing images and user-generated tags. Widely used for image-text representation learning and multimodal clustering.
Large-scale web image dataset with associated textual tags. The commonly used MMC subset contains 20k image-text pairs across 8 semantic categories.

column8: Multimodal image–text dataset containing 1000 images across 20 object categories each paired with five descriptive sentences.
Image–text dataset containing 7429 samples from 10 object categories where each image contains a single dominant object.
Image–text dataset containing 23189 samples across 43 object categories filtered to retain only single-object images with sufficient category representation.
